winner: I tried to spray paint my banana, but it slipped and went down the drain — now I've got a peel of a problem.

candidates.text: I used to love banana spray paint—it’s great for camouflage, but I always seem to lose my *peel*.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Creative twist on 'peel,' good use of required words, concise and surprising."}

candidates.text: I tried to hide my identity by putting on a disguise, but it failed because I accidentally spray-painted a banana on my face.

candidates.text: I tried to start a new business selling fruit-scented perfume, but it failed because the banana spray was just too appealing.

candidates.text: I tried to stop the fruit from slipping away, but I realized I couldn't just spray a banana with attitude.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke includes both required words and has a mild twist, but the humor is weak and the connection between 'spray' and 'banana with attitude' feels forced."}
